data.body: Jira key: DIG-1564. Manually fetched via ACLI because the Inbound Bridge has been silently broken since 2026-04-16 (tracked by bug 0e38-a5da). This local ticket will not auto-sync back to DIG-1564 until bridge-outbound sync is configured for it — tracked as part of the bidirectional-sync verification scope of this same bug.
